reviews.comment:
Venden sándwich de miga en mal estado. No atienden bien, se negaron a tostar el sándwich para una nena de 6 años, a la hora se descompuso x el mismo. Una vergüenza. No consuman alimentos ahi.

(Translated by Google)
They sell spoiled crumb sandwiches. They don't serve good service. They refused to toast a sandwich for a 6-year-old girl, and within an hour, the sandwich went bad. Disgraceful. Don't eat there.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/5216193713226017652/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURTdzdiaFVREAE
